notes: Registered supply is calculated from proposed habitat, hedgerow and watercourse extents.
Allocated area and length are calculated from allocation component rows.
Remaining capacity is calculated as proposed extent minus allocated extent.
Remaining capacity is area or length only, not biodiversity units.
Allocation unit values may relate to multiple habitat components and are deduplicated at allocation level.

Observed allocated market values are calculated from allocated biodiversity units only using average indicative unit pricing by broad unit category derived from Biodiversity Units UK February 2026 pricing. Where a single allocation relates to multiple habitat components, units are not split between habitats because the BGS register does not provide sufficient information. Registered and remaining market values are not calculated.
